title: fragaria praecox
intro: Fragaria praecox, also known as wild strawberry or woodland strawberry, is a perennial plant species in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Fragaria praecox include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Fragaria praecox is typically prepared for medicinal use through herbal tea infusions, tinctures, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
